evidenceSnippetOriginal: Microsoft Copilot is a generative artificial intelligence (GenAI) program that has capabilities to generate text and images in response to user prompts. Make sure to log in using your Monash credentials before accessing Copilot. This ensures that your data is more protected.
evidenceLocator: Microsoft Copilot page, main content section
